rag_rules: Generate guarantee clauses using visible feature names and concrete relations from the requirement, not AADL properties.
generic_rules: Use explicit named identifiers in guarantees only if they appear as visible ports or constants in the model.
Contract clauses must reference only syntactically bound symbols from the component's interface.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'guarantee "label": expression;' syntax with boolean expressions over visible features.
Do not use AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing AADL property tokens (ms, Hz, Stack_Size, etc.) as if they are AGREE-accessible variables.
irrelevant_topics: assign, assume, eq, const, validator, repair, annex placement, fusion, traceability, semantic items
